user_query: Give me a full picture of our commercial activity in Brussels.

plan.query: Give me a full picture of our commercial activity in Brussels.
plan.reasoning: The query requires a comprehensive view of all commercial activities in Brussels, which involves information from CRM, location, and company-related data. Therefore, all available agents (graph, salesforce, smartsales) should be utilized to gather the necessary information.

steps.task: Search for all accounts, contacts, opportunities, and cases related to commercial activities in Brussels.
Find any locations or physical sites associated with our commercial activities in Brussels.
Identify any emails, calendar events, or internal documents related to our commercial activities in Brussels.

plan.synthesis: Combine the results from all three steps to create a comprehensive overview of our commercial activity in Brussels, highlighting accounts, opportunities, locations, and relevant communications or documents.

invoked_agents.input: Identify any emails, calendar events, or internal documents related to our commercial activities in Brussels.
Search for all accounts, contacts, opportunities, and cases related to commercial activities in Brussels.
Find any locations or physical sites associated with our commercial activities in Brussels.
